settings.label: The Doors Are Open
settings.heading: Every crystal holds a story.
settings.subheading: Hand-picked crystals, tarot & curiosities from a real little shop in Nottinghamshire.

settings.description: Decks and card holders to guide your path
Preloved wisdom on crystals, reiki & folklore

settings.label: Proudly Independent
settings.heading: A real little shop in Sutton-in-Ashfield
settings.body: Totally Spellbound isn’t a faceless warehouse — it’s Alison’s shop on Outram Street, where every crystal, deck and curiosity is chosen by hand. When you order online, it’s packed with the same care as if you’d walked through the door.
settings.quote: Helpful like a conversation in the shop — never pushy.

settings.label: The Wheel Turns
settings.heading: Lammas — The First Harvest
settings.description: The first harvest festival of the year falls on the 1st of August. Gather abundance while the wheel turns.
